goal: Zero lint/type errors and optimized build
summary: Phase 1 complete. Clean baseline achieved: 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors, build succeeds with no warnings. Main bundle reduced from 934 KB to 108 KB via manualChunks. 4 dead files removed, server scripts moved to scripts/ directory.

  3. Add manualChunks to vite.config.ts and verify build succeeds [verified]
